name: 901 Tennent Drive
description: 901 Tennent Drive is a place to play pickleball in Wilmore, KY. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Top Seed Tennis Club
description: Top Seed Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Nicholasville, KY. There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
